ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark (e.g., linux_alternates) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark test */,
  "benchmark_type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., CPU-intensive, memory-intensive, disk-intensive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark run */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark being executed */,
  "warmup_iter" INTEGER /* Number of warmup iterations before the actual benchmark */,
  "iter" INTEGER /* Number of iterations for the benchmark */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the specific run or command */,
  "command" TEXT /* Command executed during the benchmark run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the benchmark run (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark run started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark run ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the benchmark run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the run associated with this result */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the benchmark run */,
  "lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines processed during the benchmark */,
  "env" TEXT /* Environment in which the benchmark was executed */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., average, minimum, maximum, standard deviation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result (e.g., seconds, milliseconds, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark run */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the benchmark execution (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if any error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Production, Development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "env_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., development, testing, production) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., CPU Usage, Memory Usage) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, megabytes, requests per second) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "command_text" TEXT /* The text of the command executed during the benchmark */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., shell command, API call, database query) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark run */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, JSON) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report generation (e.g., pending, generated, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notify_on_success" INTEGER /* Flag to notify user on successful runs */,
  "notify_on_failure" INTEGER /* Flag to notify user on failed runs */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, Slack, SMS) */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications (e.g., immediate, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
